_note: STUB DATA — invented during task group 2 spike. Must be replaced with a real capture from the RCDO service before any code depends on these shapes. See docs/adr/0001-rcdo-contract.md.

GET /rcdo/supporting-outcomes?orgId={org._description: Picker list. Returns active Supporting Outcomes with enough metadata for typeahead + breadcrumb. Hydration is shallow: each row carries its 4-level breadcrumb inline to avoid N+1 picker queries.

GET /rcdo/supporting-outcomes/{id}?hydra._description: Single-outcome hydration used server-side for label rehydration on commit reads. `hydrate=full` guarantees breadcrumb is present.

Expected behavior when an outcome was deleted upstream after a commit was created. The commit retains supportingOutcomeId; our backend returns the commit with supportingOutcome=null and a deletedUpstream flag. Verified by unit test (not live).

error.message: No supporting outcome with that id, or it was deactivated.

error responses._description: Shapes the RCDO service returns on failure, per spike stub. If real service differs, update RcdoClient error mapping.
